item.title: Gateway WebSocket RPC client
item.intent: Give ClawHQ the ability to talk to a running OpenClaw agent. Every live operation depends on this RPC client — without it, ClawHQ can only write files, never observe or control a deployed agent.
item.description: FOUNDATION: Every live operation — deploy health checks, config patches, session queries — goes through this client. Without it, ClawHQ can only write files; it cannot talk to a running agent. Acceptance: RPC round-trip works with real Gateway; timeout + abort signal paths exercised; typed error classes surface correct user messages.
steps: Implement token-authenticated WebSocket client for OpenClaw Gateway
Add request/response RPC with typed errors and timeout handling
Create custom error classes: GatewayError, ConnectionError, AuthError, RateLimitError, RpcTimeoutError
Add health polling with configurable interval and timeout
acceptanceCriteria: RPC round-trip works with real Gateway
Timeout and abort signal paths exercised in tests
Typed error classes surface correct user messages
Health polling detects Gateway up/down state
